findings.text: Most of it was nothing—wagon loads, dates, shorthand. Near the bottom three entries crowded together in a different hand. Smaller script. Cramped. And beside them the mark she had been chasing since the first depot. Wheel inside wheel. Beside it sat a name. A property. Two words.
findings.issue: Sustained fragment stack inside a texture-desert zone turns Sylvanas's scan into telegram prose rather than sharp tactical compression.
findings.suggestedFix: Most of it was nothing—wagon loads, dates, shorthand—but near the bottom three entries crowded together in a different hand, smaller and cramped, beside the mark she had been chasing since the first depot: wheel inside wheel. Under it sat a property name, two words.

findings.text: Outside, in the dark beyond the waystation wall, only the south road remained.
findings.couldEndEarlierAt: "I had no intention of stopping," Jaina said, dry as old paper.
findings.issue: The line converts a concrete night image into thematic closure about the chosen route.
findings.suggestedFix: Outside the waystation wall, the south road faded into the dark.

audits.cleanReason: Checked likely seep candidates ('Worse.', 'Interrupted.', 'Barov.', and the depot/road tactical fragments) against Sylvanas's clipped field register. They read as in-body assessments or note-taking rather than narrator commentary. The one sentence that drifted into thematic closure was already captured under GPT-5 F7 and not re-killed here.

Audited the chapter's higher-level tactical shorthand ('This was arranged,' 'We're reading a road after the wagons passed,' 'Origin,' 'It's a road to follow.'). Each one cashes out from local evidence already on the page, so the chapter's compression is mostly anchored rather than fake-specific.

No dialogue exchange in this chapter sets up a plain-speech translation request ('plainly', 'smaller words', 'short version', street-level recast), so this pass surfaced no fake-simplification candidates.

summary.verdictReason: Fail on one SEVERE GPT-5 rhythmic-sameness hit in a texture-desert cluster, plus one additional mild scene-closing closure line. Texture metrics also show a structural texture deficit across the chapter.

notes: structural rhythm concerns: comma_period_ratio below range
structural rhythm concerns: one_sentence_paragraph_pct above range

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 2.2% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'. These create connective tissue between actions. | COMPOUND CLAUSES: 3.8% (floor: 4.0%, human: 8.5%). Join related ideas: ', and' / ', but' / ', yet'. Adjacent short sentences often want combining.
